info.title: NurseConnect
info.description: NurseConnect backend — production-grade healthcare marketplace platform

post.description: Create a pending account and send a code to the supplied email.
Authenticate a verified account using email and password.

schema.title: Response List Patients Api Patients Get
Response List Family Members Api Family Members Get

post.description:
Worker pushes current GPS coordinates.

Stored on the worker profile (used inline by the request-visibility filter)
and also appended to ``worker_location_log`` so we keep an audit trail.
Authenticated worker only — workers can update only their own location.

get.description: Search workers — accessible by consumers and admins.

schema.title: Response Search Workers Api Workers Search Get

get.description:
List every active service + package with the worker's current
qualification + preference status and whether they may opt in.

schema.title: Response My Service Eligibility Api Workers Me Service Eligibility Get

put.description:
Opt the worker in/out of a specific service or package.

Rules:
  - Worker can OPT_IN only when qualification_status == APPROVED.
  - Worker can always OPT_OUT or PAUSE.

schema.title: Response List Services Api Services Get
Response List Care Packages Api Care Packages Get
Response My Consumer Bookings Api Bookings Consumer Get
Response My Worker Bookings Api Bookings Worker Get

get.description:
Unassigned bookings the worker is qualified for, opted into, AND inside
the current radius wave.

Patch 2 filters (qualification + opt-in) run BEFORE Patch 3 proximity
filtering, so we don't pay the Haversine cost for ineligible rows. Wave
progression is computed opportunistically per booking based on elapsed
time since ``booking.created_at`` — no scheduler required.

schema.title: Response New Requests Api Bookings Worker New Requests Get

post.description:
Concurrency-safe worker claim of an open booking.

Uses an atomic conditional UPDATE so that exactly one worker can win the
race. The DB decides the winner; the API never optimistically assigns.

Returns 200 with the booking row on success (idempotent for the winning
worker), 409 for already-claimed by someone else, 410 for not-claimable,
404 if missing.

schema.title: Response List Vitals Api Visits  Booking Id  Vitals Get

get.description:
Patch 5A — fetch the per-booking insurance coverage assessment.

Visible to:
  * consumer who owns the booking
  * assigned worker
  * admin_finance / admin_clinical / admin_super

schema.title: Response List Care Notes Api Care Notes Patient  Patient Id  Get
Response List Abha Records Api Abha Records Patient  Patient Id  Get
Response List Open Api Escalations Open Get

get.description:
Production hardening: per-role scoping.
  - admin*  → unrestricted
  - worker  → only escalations on bookings assigned to them
  - consumer → only escalations on their own bookings
booking_id filter is enforced AFTER scoping, so cross-tenant probing returns [].

schema.title: Response List Escalations Api Escalations  Get

get.description:
Assessments awaiting clinical review.

Includes both rows explicitly ``flagged_for_review=True`` and rows whose
coverage_status is ``under_review`` — these are the queue's two sources.

schema.title: Response Submit Batch Api Offline Sync  Post
Response List My Notifications Api Notifications  Get

get.description: Published assessments visible to the worker.

post.description:
Worker submits answers → score computed + attempt persisted.

Passing an assessment does NOT auto-opt the worker in for a service.
Qualification status is upserted via Patch 2 qualification engine.

get.description: Trainer/reviewer view: all modules with full lifecycle metadata.

WorkerPublicOut.title: WorkerPublicOut
WorkerPublicOut.description: Worker info exposed to consumers during search.
